name: clawhip-discord-bridge
description: Standalone Discord ↔ tmux bridge for Clawhip-backed unattended development

scripts.check: node --check scripts/clawhip-discord-bridge.mjs && node --check scripts/clawhip-discord-bridge-lib.mjs && node --check scripts/bridge/config.mjs && node --check scripts/bridge/command-router.mjs && node --check scripts/bridge/reply-monitor.mjs && node --check scripts/bridge/runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/bridge/dispatch-state.mjs && node --check scripts/bridge/clawhip-notify.mjs
